title: Add cross-linking between docs site and Blazor sample app
body:
Docs and sample app were isolated — no way to navigate between them. This adds bidirectional navigation and links type names to API reference.

### Docs site
- Added **Sample** link to top nav bar (`docs/toc.yml`)
- Added "Try it live →" callout on pages with Blazor demos (`blurhash.md`, `geometry.md`, `path-interpolation.md`)
- Linked type names to API docs via `xref:` (`SKConfettiView`, `SKLottieView`, `SKGeometry`, `SKPath`, `SKPathDirection`, `SKLottieImageSource`, `SKLottieRepeatMode`)

### Blazor sample
- Replaced generic "About" link with **Docs** and **API** links in top bar
- Added "View documentation ↗" link on each sample page back to corresponding docs
- Linked inline type names (`SKBlurHash`, `SKPathInterpolation`, `SKGeometry`) to API reference

### Example: docs callout
```markdown
> [!TIP]
> **[Try it live →](../sample/blurhash)** — Interactive BlurHash demo in the Blazor sample app.
```

### Screenshots

![Home page showing Docs and API links in top bar](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5459920b-5181-45ae-bddf-7efcfbff9961)

![Shapes page with documentation link and API type link](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4f7b810a-29b8-4625-be53-303c6ac066cc)
